title: Item Seed (S05 Item Generator)
description: A seed for a procedurally-generated equipment item. Items are seed-deterministic: the same ItemSeed always yields the same item, stats, and icon. Loaded from mods/reachlock/items/*.ron into reachlock_core::item::types::ItemSeed. item_type is a nested enum where EVERY level uses snake_case: top level one of equipment|consumable|component|implant|cosmetic, each wrapping its own kind enum in snake_case (e.g. {"equipment": {"weapon": {"kinetic": "cannon"}}}, {"consumable": "medkit"}, {"component": "hull_plating"}).

seed.description: Canonical seed (<= 2^53 so it survives JSON float round-trip)

item_type.description: Nested enum: one top-level key (Equipment|Consumable|Component|Implant|Cosmetic) wrapping its kind. Examples: {"Equipment": {"Weapon": {"Kinetic": "Cannon"}}}, {"Consumable": "Medkit"}, {"Component": "HullPlating"}

faction.description: Owning/flavoring faction id, e.g. "compact", "isc", "corp_charter", "the_reach", or empty

biome.description: Originating biome flavor, e.g. "void", "ocean", "desert", or empty
